title: Ability to Schedule Multiples of the Same Task (Duplicate Multiple Groups at Once)
excerpt:
Hello, 
Submitting a request to be able to queue multiple actions of the same type at once. For Example: Group Duplications. Instead of clicking into menu to duplicate one at a time, give us a dropdown or an input field …

posts.author: jharness (Josh Harness)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Submitting a request to be able to queue multiple actions of the same type at once. For Example: Group Duplications. Instead of clicking into menu to duplicate one at a time, give us a dropdown or an input field to duplicate the same group X number of times. Helps when having to duplicate groups hundreds of times to set and submit verses clicking and waiting and clicking again.

posts.author: HStothard (Helen Stothard)
posts.cookedHtml: I really need this feature. On some projects I need to duplicate a group ten times and its so time consuming and then I have to take all the copy words out of the new groups
